title: Sabo Reveals the Truth of the Levely
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Bepo, Sabo, Cobra as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You realize you will be their number one target, right, SABO?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Or should I start callingk you flame emperor boy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm not too hot on that name...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter what the truth behind King cobra's assassination is...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The news reports have made you a hero already.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: In the eyes of revolutionaries everywhere,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: While there are certainly many malignant, power hungry deposits who deserve that reputation...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are also a number of intelligent and fair rulers too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And Arabasta's King cobra was in a class of his own.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone considered him to be an outstanding sovereign.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unfortunately, misinformation spreads faster than nuances like that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This might be cold to say, but while I feel bad for what happened to King Cobra...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think I can live with the way this all played out if it helps fuel the flames of rebellion!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: My, you really are unshakeable.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Slam

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Then spit it out already!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What really happen- Ed....?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Is there any truth behind this scoop?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ve all shed tears over this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: desperately tryingk to find an ex- plantation!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because we all wanted to believe in you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Over a month ago...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At the home of the gods in the Holy Land of Mariejois.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They're attacking the home of the gods!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Not long after the reverie began...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get out here and help us, you lousy Bureau- Crats!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They blew up the storehouse!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The intruders are with the Revolution- any army!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We're Under Attack!!

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: It's the four captains!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is outrageous! First they attacked our beloved symbol...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And now the plebs have taken away our exquisite food!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does the jealousy of these vermin know no bounds?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't even want to keep the heads, just dispose of them at once!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After that, summon ALL THOSE DREADFUL BODYGURDS AND HAVE THEM EXECUTED!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THOSE MSERABLE WRETCHES ALLOWED THIS TO HAPPEN ON THEIR WATCH!

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
